summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS Iteration 21 production-hardening features. All 13 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - Revenue Analytics Dashboard with 4 metric cards (Sales, Orders, Avg Order, Tables), Hourly Revenue chart with Recharts, QR Ordering Kill Switch toggle working (disable shows 'Ordering Paused' on guest menu, enable restores normal operation), Subscription banner showing trial days warning, POS screen regression passed.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - appears during initial render but chart displays correctly

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.js: Revenue Analytics Dashboard with 4 metric cards (Sales with Cash/Card breakdown, Orders with POS/QR breakdown, Avg Order, Tables with Open/Total), Hourly Revenue chart using Recharts AreaChart, QR Ordering Kill Switch toggle with visual feedback
GuestMenu.js: Shows 'Ordering Paused' message with pause emoji when QR ordering is disabled (503 response from backend)
POSScreen.js: Reconnection storm jitter implemented - random 1-5s delay on offline sync (line 170-171)
printer.js: Receipt chunking for large orders - 4KB chunks with 50ms delay between chunks (lines 137-168)
reports.py: /reports/today endpoint returns hourly_revenue array, qr_orders, pos_orders, open_tables, total_tables
qr_menu.py: QR kill switch checks qr_ordering_enabled field, returns 503 with 'temporarily disabled' message
models.py: Restaurant model has qr_ordering_enabled field (defaults to True)

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed, 6 skipped due to fixture dependencies)

seed_data_creation: QR orders created during testing with guest_name prefix 'TEST_Iteration21'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified 4 production-hardening features: 1) Revenue Analytics Dashboard at /dashboard with metric cards (data-testid='metric-total-sales', 'metric-total-orders', 'metric-avg-order', 'metric-tables'), Hourly Revenue chart (data-testid='revenue-chart-card'), shows £0.00 because no completed orders in current business day (2AM-2AM window). 2) QR Ordering Kill Switch toggle (data-testid='qr-ordering-toggle', 'qr-toggle-switch') - when disabled, guest menu shows 'Ordering Paused' message. 3) Reconnection storm jitter in POSScreen.js - random 1-5s delay before syncing offline orders. 4) Receipt chunking in printer.js - 4KB chunks with 50ms delay for large receipts. Subscription banner shows trial days warning. POS screen shows printer status indicator. All previous features (QR guest menu, WebSocket alerts, local receipt generation) still working.

frontend_tests.subscription_banner: PASSED - Trial: 2 days left — Subscribe now to avoid interruption
frontend_tests.qr_toggle_disable: PASSED - Toggle changes to 'Disabled', toast shows 'QR ordering disabled'
frontend_tests.qr_menu_paused: PASSED - Shows 'Ordering Paused' with pause emoji and message
frontend_tests.qr_toggle_enable: PASSED - Toggle changes back to 'Guests can order', toast shows 'QR ordering enabled'
frontend_tests.qr_menu_working: PASSED - Pizza Palace Updated, Table 1, 11 products, add to cart works
frontend_tests.pos_screen_loads: PASSED - HevaPOS heading, 80 pending orders, 11 products, printer status indicator
